build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(620, 300, 25)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(15).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=25).rect(480, 280).extrude(5)
STEP 4: Create bolt circle — .workplane(centered=True).circle(90).extrude(25)
STEP 5: Add bolt holes — .faces(">Z").workplane().moveTo(-17.5, -17.5).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 6: Repeat step 5 for all six bolt holes evenly spaced around the circle
